overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a dystopian cyberpunk game depicting a player navigating a sandstorm-swept urban environment with brutalist architecture. The player moves from narrow debris-filled alleys through dark underpasses to open plazas while encountering hostile NPCs, with the entire scene bathed in an orange dust-filled atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow debris-filled alley between brutalist concrete towers

agents.ego_description: walking cautiously through the debris-strewn alley with weapon drawn, approaching a dark overpass

entered.detail: massive concrete building with geometric balconies and dark windows
tall concrete tower with multiple levels and industrial detailing
concrete ground littered with rubble, trash, and discarded items
illuminated digital billboard displaying advertisements on the right building wall

segments.scene_description: The player moves through a narrow alley between massive brutalist concrete buildings in a heavy sandstorm. The ground is covered in debris and rubble, while a glowing digital billboard is visible on the right wall ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway beneath building overpass with illuminated interior windows

events.description: enters dark covered underpass beneath building, natural light drops significantly
Sandevistan cyberware ability activated, slowing time perception as indicated by on-screen UI

agents.ego_description: proceeding through the dark underpass with weapon ready, passing illuminated interior windows showing lit rooms inside

entered.detail: dark concrete ceiling of the building overpass creating a tunnel effect
large windows revealing brightly lit interior spaces with silhouetted figures inside

segments.scene_description: The player enters a dark covered walkway beneath a building overpass, shielded from the storm. Artificial light emanates from interior windows on the left while the Sandevistan ability activates, and the surrounding buildings appear to recede slightly as the player advances.

scene_state.functional_zone: dusty urban street with hostile NPCs ahead

events.description: exits dark underpass back into dust-filled exterior street, visibility improves slightly
encounters hostile Maelstrom gang members standing in the street ahead as indicated by on-screen dialogue

agents.ego_description: advancing toward hostile figures with weapon aimed, preparing for potential engagement while moving through the dust

notable_agents.action: hostile gang member standing in the middle of the street facing the player
second hostile figure moving along the right building wall

entered.detail: illuminated digital screen on the right building wall displaying colorful advertisements
silhouetted hostile figures standing in the street ahead through the dust

segments.scene_description: Exiting the underpass, the player returns to the dust-choked exterior street and spots hostile NPCs ahead. The environment remains enclosed by tall concrete buildings on both sides, with digital advertisements visible on the right wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with palm trees and elevated walkway

events.description: street opens into wider plaza area with visible palm trees and distant tower structures

agents.ego_description: moving toward the open plaza with palm trees swaying in the storm wind, approaching an elevated walkway structure

notable_agents.action: figure standing near the palm trees in the plaza ahead

entered.detail: tall palm trees swaying in the wind visible through the dust in the open plaza
metal elevated walkway or bridge structure spanning across the plaza ahead
tall futuristic tower visible in the far distance through the dust
illuminated digital advertisement screen on the left building showing character artwork

segments.scene_description: The environment opens into a wider plaza with palm trees visible through the orange dust. The player approaches an elevated walkway structure while the surrounding brutalist buildings recede into the distance, and a new digital screen appears on the left building.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a claustrophobic, debris-strewn alleyway into a wide, dust-shrouded urban plaza. It begins by pushing through a heavy sandstorm between massive brutalist concrete buildings, passing a glowing digital billboard amidst the rubble. As the camera enters a dark covered walkway beneath an overpass, the storm fades and artificial light spills from interior windows while a Sandevistan ability activates, causing the surrounding architecture to recede. The scene then shifts back into the orange, dust-choked exterior street where hostile NPCs appear between tall walls and digital advertisements. Finally, the environment opens up into a wider plaza featuring palm trees and an elevated walkway, with the brutalist skyline receding into the distance as a new digital screen emerges on the left.
